; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-06-18
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions

AFFECT [[11826530258447315599]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[997732844086923854]]
		REPLACE [[7713147298280334]] WITH {
			~&7713147298280334&~: 350
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
